response.justification: Despite strong full-stack and open-source experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation contexts, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ at National Instruments and no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols required for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical documentation skills
Proven ability to lead, mentor, and conduct technical workshops
concerns: No clear evidence of professional C++/STL development in the last 8+ years
Lacks experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not the required C++ and embedded/cloud automation stack
